title: mimulus uvedaliae var. lutea
intro: Mimulus uvedaliae var. lutea, also known as Monkey Flower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Phrymaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mimulus uvedaliae var. lutea include treating anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal infusions, salves, and creams.
